revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Awaga Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199228977 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y}} }} {{old move|date=19 June 2023|from=Awaga-jinja|destination=Awaga Shrine|result=moved|link=Special:Permalink/1161016199#Requested move 19 June 2023}} == Requested move 19 June 2023 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] after discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.'' The result of the move request was: '''moved.''' ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) – [[User talk:MaterialWorks|Material]][[Special:Contributions/MaterialWorks|Works]] ping me! 10:48, 27 June 2023 (UTC) ---- [[:Awaga-jinja]] → {{no redirect|Awaga Shrine}} – Shrine is more clear to english speakers [[MOS:Japan]]. [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 22:26, 19 June 2023 (UTC) *{{no redirect|Awaga Shrine}} or {{no redirect|Awaga shrine}}? —⁠ ⁠[[User:BarrelProof|BarrelProof]] ([[User talk:BarrelProof|talk]]) 23:24, 19 June 2023 (UTC) *'''Support''' with caps as proposed. The descriptor is part of the proper name. [[User:Dekimasu|Dekimasu]][[User talk:Dekimasu|よ!]] 02:41, 20 June 2023 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Awaga_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199228977 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y}} }} {{old move|date=19 June 2023|from=Awaga-jinja|destination=Awaga Shrine|result=moved|link=Special:Permalink/1161016199#Requested move 19 June 2023}} == Requested move 19 June 2023 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] after discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.'' The result of the move request was: '''moved.''' ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) – [[User talk:MaterialWorks|Material]][[Special:Contributions/MaterialWorks|Works]] ping me! 10:48, 27 June 2023 (UTC) ---- [[:Awaga-jinja]] → {{no redirect|Awaga Shrine}} – Shrine is more clear to english speakers [[MOS:Japan]]. [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 22:26, 19 June 2023 (UTC) *{{no redirect|Awaga Shrine}} or {{no redirect|Awaga shrine}}? —⁠ ⁠[[User:BarrelProof|BarrelProof]] ([[User talk:BarrelProof|talk]]) 23:24, 19 June 2023 (UTC) *'''Support''' with caps as proposed. The descriptor is part of the proper name. [[User:Dekimasu|Dekimasu]][[User talk:Dekimasu|よ!]] 02:41, 20 June 2023 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:50, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
